title: Trade Uses
description: Shows how many times you can use a trade before restock.
body:
Shows how many times you can use a trade before restock when you hover over one!

This mod is only required on the **client-side**, and it works in **multiplayer**!


The tooltip's text can be modified, its file is in ***config/tradeuses_text.txt***

You can also change it in-game! (Config page requires **Mod Menu** on Fabric)

You can use color codes with the **§** character, and you can make the text multi-line!

You have these placeholders at your disposal, their names should be self-explanatory: *{uses}*, *{max_uses}*, *{uses_left}*

[![Bisect Hosting partnership banner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/51390814-cfac-402d-86aa-6bfdcd30361f.webp "Check out BisectHosting!")](https://bisecthosting.com/khajiitos)
